student.name: Suresh Yadav
student.lead_source: Downloaded study material from PW app

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, am I speaking with Suresh Yadav? This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. I noticed you Downloaded study material from PW app — wanted to reach out and see how I can help.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan ji, main Suresh bol raha hun. Actually maine sirf dekha tha app pe, but abhi kuch decide nahi kiya hai.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul Suresh ji, no pressure at all! Main bas janana chahti thi ki aap kis class mein hain aur kya preparation kar rahe hain? Maybe main kuch help kar sakun.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Main class 10th mein hun. JEE ke baare mein soch raha hun but thoda confused hun ki kaise start karun.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great choice Suresh ji! JEE ki preparation class 10th se start karna bahut smart decision hai. Aapka target JEE Main 2027 hai na? Woh perfect timing hai - 20 months ka time mil jayega proper preparation ke liye.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan, but papa kehte hain ki pehle budget dekh lete hain. Woh bhi phone pe hain... Papa, aap baat kar lijiye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste uncle ji! Main Priya hun PhysicsWallah se. Suresh ji ne bataya ki aap JEE preparation ke baare mein discuss kar rahe hain. Main aapko proper details de sakti hun courses aur fees ke baare mein.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Namaste beta. Haan, mera beta prepare karna chahta hai but humein budget ka bhi dhyan rakhna padta hai. Kya rates hain aapke?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul samajh sakti hun uncle ji. Hamare paas different options hain. JEE ke liye humara most popular course hai JEE Arjuna 2027 - jo hai 19,999 rupees ka. But main bata dun ki humara EMI option bhi hai - sirf 1,999 rupees per month through PW Pay.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: 1,999 rupees monthly... thoda zyada lag raha hai. Koi aur cheaper option hai kya? Aur yeh course mein kya milta hai exactly?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Uncle ji, yeh 1,999 rupees per month matlab daily sirf 66 rupees - jo aap chai pe spend karte hain usse bhi kam! Course mein milta hai complete JEE syllabus, live classes, doubt solving, practice tests, aur recorded lectures bhi. 0% interest hai EMI pe.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Hmm... beta sab samjha rahe hain but hum abhi decide nahi kar sakte. Kya kuch din time mil sakta hai sochne ke liye?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul uncle ji, koi jaldi nahi hai! But main suggest karungi ki Suresh ji ko free trial de dete hain 7 days ka. Usse pata chal jayega ki quality kaisi hai, teachers kaise padhate hain. Phir aap decide kar sakte hain comfortably.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Free trial ka matlab kya hai? Kuch hidden charges toh nahi hain? Aur agar pasand nahi aaya toh?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul koi hidden charges nahi uncle ji! 7 days completely free - live classes attend kar sakte hain, material download kar sakte hain. Agar pasand nahi aaya toh bas cancel kar dena, koi paisa nahi katega. Main aapka number register kar dun trial ke liye?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Thik hai, trial le sakte hain. But confirm kar dena ki free hai. Number hai 9 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 0. Suresh, tu bhi sun raha hai na beta?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect uncle ji! 9 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 0 noted. Main abhi activate kar deti hun. Suresh ji, aap app download kar lijiye, credentials SMS se aa jayenge. Koi doubt ho toh call kar lena. Deal?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan thik hai didi. Main try karunga 7 days. Agar achha laga toh papa se baat karunga fees ke baare mein.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect Suresh ji! Main personally follow up karungi 3 days baad ki kaisa lag raha hai. Uncle ji, thank you itna patiently sunne ke liye. All the best Suresh ji for your JEE preparation!

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Thank you didi. Umeed hai achha experience hoga. Papa bhi satisfied hain trial ke saath. Phir baat karte hain.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you so much! Take care uncle ji aur Suresh ji. Happy learning! Jai Hind!

slack_message.preview: 🔥 HOT lead: Suresh Yadav, JEE Main, Class 10, Patna. High intent, ready to enroll. Immediate callback recommended.

email.subject: Your JEE Main Preparation Plan — PhysicsWallah
email.preview: Hi Suresh, it was great speaking with you today! Based on your preparation goals, I've put together a personalized plan for your JEE Main journey.

crm_record.lead_source: Downloaded study material from PW app
crm_record.notes: High engagement, self decision-maker. Likely to convert with one follow-up call.
